kalshiQuestion: Will Charles Leclerc set the fastest valid qualifying lap time in the Qualifying session (Q3) for the 2026 Monaco Grand Prix?

call.aiReasoning: Ferrari’s strong showing in FP1, Leclerc’s home-track advantage, and his proven qualifying excellence all point toward him setting the fastest valid lap in Q3 at Monaco. While Mercedes remains a threat, the evidence leans toward Leclerc prevailing.
